features: 2 Outlets + 2M Cable - Provides 2 UK sockets (13A/250V~) with a 2 meter extension cord, perfect for reaching behind furniture or setting up workstations.
Premium Safety Construction - Uses flame-retardant materials and thick 3x1.25mm² wiring for stable power delivery and overheating overloading prevention.
Child-Safe UK Power Strip - Features built-in shutter protection to prevent accidental electric shocks, making it family-friendly for homes with curious children.

【Multiple Protection】The multi plug extension sockets has overvoltage, overcurrent, overload, and short circuit protection, which can cut off the power automatically, ensuring safe use and prevented from accidental injury.CE&UKCA Approved.
Versatile Home & Office Use - Ideal for bedrooms, kitchens, offices, and dorm rooms - powers lamps, chargers, and small appliances safely and conveniently.
description: Specifications Sockets: 2 Sockets Voltage: 13A/250V~ Max. Load: 3120W Cable Length: 2 Meter Wall-mounted: Yes Surge Protection: No Copper Wire: H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm²
